name: 贝如塔医院 Beta Hospital
short_description: 《贝如塔医院》是一款以荒废医院为主题的恐怖游戏，你将以第一人称视角，前往贝如塔医院寻找自己失踪的妻子——伊纳，但在医院中却遇到一些不太寻常的事件...
detailed_description:
Game introduction

Beta Hospital is a horror game with a lot of Internet memes, with some funny content, but the main tone is horror.

You will play WangYuan, to Beluta hospital to find his missing wife Yina, on the way will meet a strange woman Yilian, she is an enemy or a friend?

Strange atmosphere suddenly met his wife, but she did some unusual actions, is a person or a ghost?

Exchange QQ group

The group includes some free beta minigames
